ddls:
CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "dev_name" TEXT /* Full name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., developer, lead, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the developer belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the developer was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the developer left the company (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the developer (e.g., active, inactive, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the repository was created */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who owns the repository */,
  "last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last commit in the repository */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the repository is private or public */,
  "visibility_level" TEXT /* Visibility level of the repository (e.g., public, internal, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the commit was made */,
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who made the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date the commit was made */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the commit */,
  "+lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines added in the commit */,
  "-lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines removed in the commit */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch where the commit was made */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash of the commit */,
  "commit_size" INTEGER /* Size of the commit in bytes */,
  "code_quality_score" TEXT /* Score indicating the quality of the code in the commit */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the commit review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_dev_id FOREIGN KEY ("dev_id") REFERENCES developers ("dev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit statistic */,
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "commits_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of total commits made by the developer */,
  "total_commits" INTEGER /* Total number of commits made by the developer */,
  "first_commit" TEXT /* Date of the first commit made by the developer */,
  "last_commit" TEXT /* Date of the last commit made by the developer */,
  "active_days" INTEGER /* Number of active days the developer has committed code */,
  "commit_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of commits made by the developer */,
  "average_commit_size" TEXT /* Average size of commits made by the developer */,
  "average_code_quality_score" TEXT /* Average code quality score of commits made by the developer */,
  "total_contribution" INTEGER /* Total number of lines added and removed by the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_statistics_dev_id FOREIGN KEY ("dev_id") REFERENCES developers ("dev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit history entry */,
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date the commit was made */,
  "commit_branch" TEXT /* Name of the branch where the commit was made */,
  "commit_size" INTEGER /* Size of the commit in bytes */,
  "code_quality_score" TEXT /* Score indicating the quality of the code in the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_history_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_history_dev_id FOREIGN KEY ("dev_id") REFERENCES developers ("dev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_ranking" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit rank */,
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the developer based on commits */,
  "total_commits" INTEGER /* Total number of commits made by the developer */,
  "average_commit_size" TEXT /* Average size of commits made by the developer */,
  "average_code_quality_score" TEXT /* Average code quality score of commits made by the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_ranking_dev_id FOREIGN KEY ("dev_id") REFERENCES developers ("dev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit trend */,
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend period */,
  "commit_count" INTEGER /* Number of commits made by the developer during the trend period */,
  "average_commit_size" TEXT /* Average size of commits made during the trend period */,
  "average_code_quality_score" TEXT /* Average code quality score of commits made during the trend period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_trends_dev_id FOREIGN KEY ("dev_id") REFERENCES developers ("dev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit impact */,
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "+lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines added by the developer's commits */,
  "-lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines removed by the developer's commits */,
  "net_lines" INTEGER /* Net change in lines by the developer's commits */,
  "impact_score" TEXT /* Score indicating the overall impact of the developer's commits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_impact_dev_id FOREIGN KEY ("dev_id") REFERENCES developers ("dev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_collaboration" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "dev_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first developer */,
  "dev_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second developer */,
  "commits" INTEGER /* Number of commits made together */,
  "shared_repos" INTEGER /* Number of shared repositories */,
  "average_commit_size" TEXT /* Average size of commits made together */,
  "average_code_quality_score" TEXT /* Average code quality score of commits made together */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_collaboration_dev_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("dev_id_1") REFERENCES developers ("dev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_collaboration_dev_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("dev_id_2") REFERENCES developers ("dev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made by the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_reviews_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES developers ("dev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit associated with the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "issue_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of the issue (e.g., bug, feature request, documentation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_issues_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of the tag (e.g., feature, bugfix, documentation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_tags_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit associated with the branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "branch_status" TEXT /* Status of the branch (e.g., active, merged, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_branches_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)
